title: stipagrostis zeyheri subsp. barbata
intro: Stipagrostis zeyheri subsp. barbata, also known as the Cape beard-grass, is a type of grass native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cape beard-grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
